SCOPE.CTN 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Detecting lymphocyte aggregate-like niches in CRC VisiumHD data
    • Systematic CTN screening in HGSOC CosMx data
    • Systematic CTN screening in NSCLC IMC data
    • Detecting TLS-like CTNs in PF Xenium data
    • Prefiltering cell type triads using CLQ permutation test

Package index

All functions

Build_cell_neighbor_maxdist()
Constructing neighborhood cell type count and proportion matrices
CLQ_permutation_test()
Computing colocation quotient (CLQ) on permutated data
CTN_annotate()
Rename Consolidated CTNs Based on Dominant Cell Types
CTN_presence_coxph()
Cox regression on patient survival based on CTN presence
color_CTN_names()
Separating cell types in CTN labels with colored dots
compute_CLQ_observed()
Computing observed colocation quotient (CLQ)
compute_CLQ_permutated()
Computing colocation quotient (CLQ) on permutated data
draw_CTN_celltype()
Spatial Visualization of CTNs and Cell Types
draw_CTN_celltype_prop()
CTN cell type proportion dotplot
draw_CTN_coxph_logHR()
Plot Cox regression results on patient-level CTN presence
draw_CTN_dendro()
Draw CTN dendrogram
draw_CTN_umap()
Visualize CTN cell type composition similarity using UMAP
draw_htmap_jaccard_index()
Jaccard similarity index heatmap
draw_silhoutte_score()
Visualize silhouette score
jaccard()
Compute Jaccard similarity index
jaccard_dist_hclust()
Perform hierarchical clustering on Jaccard distance
run_SCOPE()
Multi-view cell type triad niche screening
run_SCOPE_subcluster()
Subclustering cells labeled as "CTN" in initial analysis

Developed by Yufan Wu, Yutong Pan, Lulu Shang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
